_comment: SLO baselines for Bodam platform. Measured 2026-03-14 on local Docker environment (10 VUs, 1 min baseline test).
_note: Rate limiting (429) accounted for majority of failures - auth endpoint limit 10 req/min per IP is working correctly. Non-rate-limited requests show excellent performance.

chat_session_create._note: Requires real LLM API key to measure

chat_message_rag._note: Requires real LLM API key to measure

vector_search._note: Requires ingested insurance data to measure

throughput._note_error_rate: High error rate (97.8%) due to IP-based rate limiting with 10 concurrent VUs from single IP. API itself is healthy - p95 166ms well within SLO.
